commented_code:
+{
+  "name": "@tanstack/lit-query",
+  "version": "0.1.0",
+  "description": "Lit adapter for TanStack Query Core",
+  "license": "MIT",
+  "type": "module",
+  "main": "dist-cjs/index.js",
+  "module": "dist/index.js",
+  "types": "dist/index.d.ts",
+  "sideEffects": false,
+  "files": [
+    "dist",
+    "dist-cjs",
+    "src/**/*.ts",
+    "!src/tests/**/*"
+  ],
+  "exports": {
+    ".": {
+      "import": {
+        "types": "./dist/index.d.ts",
+        "default": "./dist/index.js"
+      },
+      "require": {
+        "types": "./dist-cjs/index.d.cts",
+        "default": "./dist-cjs/index.js"
+      },
+      "default": "./dist/index.js"
+    },
+    "./package.json": "./package.json"
+  },
+  "scripts": {
+    "compile": "tsc --build",
+    "build:deps": "pnpm --dir ../query-core run build",
+    "build": "pnpm run build:deps && pnpm run build:esm && pnpm run build:cjs",
+    "build:esm": "tsc -p tsconfig.build.json",
+    "build:cjs": "node -e \"require('node:fs').rmSync('dist-cjs', { recursive: true, force: true })\" && tsc -p tsconfig.build.cjs.json && node scripts/write-cjs-package.mjs",
+    "test:types": "tsc --noEmit",
+    "typecheck": "pnpm run test:types",
+    "test:eslint": "eslint .",
+    "lint": "pnpm run test:eslint",
+    "lint:fix": "eslint . --fix",
+    "format": "prettier --write .",
+    "format:check": "prettier --check .",
+    "test:lib": "vitest run",
+    "test": "pnpm run test:lib",
+    "test:lib:dev": "vitest",
+    "test:watch": "pnpm run test:lib:dev",
+    "package:check": "node scripts/check-package.mjs",
+    "package:smoke:cjs-types": "node scripts/check-cjs-types-smoke.mjs",

discussion_comments.commented_code:
@@ -0,0 +1,115 @@
+{
+  "name": "@tanstack/lit-query",
+  "version": "0.1.0",
+  "description": "Lit adapter for TanStack Query Core",
+  "license": "MIT",
+  "type": "module",
+  "main": "dist-cjs/index.js",
+  "module": "dist/index.js",
+  "types": "dist/index.d.ts",
+  "sideEffects": false,

+    "build:cjs": "node -e \"require('node:fs').rmSync('dist-cjs', { recursive: true, force: true })\" && tsc -p tsconfig.build.cjs.json && node scripts/write-cjs-package.mjs",
+    "test:types": "tsc --noEmit",

discussion_comments.comment_body: package:check has been removed. The CJS smoke check is still needed because lit-query publishes custom CJS output/types
`vitest --watch` is a thing, `vitest run --watch` isn't - they have a dedicated `watch` command instead.

I'm using [`expect-type`(used by vitest internally)](https://vitest.dev/guide/features.html#type-testing) here to ensure type safety in our type tests for useSuspenseQuery, useSuspenseQueries, queryOptions.
